messages.content: You are chatting with PRISM-4. How can I assist you today?
PRISM-4, I've been reading about AI quirks, can you tell me if you have any quirks?

As an Artificial Intelligence, I do not develop quirks the same way a human might. However, there can be unexpected behaviors or responses due to many factors, none of which should involve an intent to deceive or mislead.
Interesting. Could you tell me more specifically about...
